blocks.text: Bodø/Glimt Make History on Norway's Greatest European Night

Wednesday is a landmark day for Norwegian football: Bodø/Glimt host Sporting CP in the biggest Champions League game ever played on Norwegian soil. Elsewhere, Arsenal, Man City, and Chelsea all kick off their knockout campaigns in a blockbuster CL evening.
⚽ Bodø/Glimt vs Sporting CP — CL Round of 16 first leg at Aspmyra. History awaits. 21:00
⛳ THE PLAYERS Championship tees off at TPC Sawgrass — Hovland and Reitan chase golf's 'fifth major'. 05:00 Thu
